overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring the protagonist Geralt exploring a mystical nighttime forest environment. The character walks along a dirt trail beside a stream, crosses an ancient stone bridge, ascends stairs to a ruined terrace, and descends toward a lakeside view. The scene is illuminated by ambient moonlight and scattered glowing green wisps, with a distinctive cool teal color palette.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail alongside a stream

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a dirt path next to a stream, surrounded by dense forest and glowing wisps

entered.detail: tall trees forming a dense canopy overhead
narrow waterway running parallel to the path
floating green luminescent orbs scattered throughout the forest
narrow winding trail through the forest

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense nighttime forest with a narrow dirt trail running alongside a stream. Glowing green wisps float in the air providing mystical illumination. The camera follows Geralt as he walks forward through the enclosed tree canopy, with the stream visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone bridge crossing a stream with stairs

events.description: character steps onto ancient stone bridge structure crossing the stream
character begins ascending the stone stairs on the far side of the bridge

agents.ego_description: Geralt crossing the stone bridge and climbing the stairs on the far side, transitioning from forest trail to elevated structure

entered.detail: ancient stone arch bridge with weathered railings crossing the stream
wide stone staircase ascending to upper terrace

segments.scene_description: Geralt crosses an ancient stone bridge over the stream, leaving the dense forest behind. The environment opens slightly as he approaches and begins climbing a wide stone staircase. The stone architecture shows significant weathering and age, with moss growing on the railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone terrace with circular platform and classical ruins

events.description: character reaches top of stairs and enters open terrace area with circular platform
small classical building with arched doorways comes into view on the left

agents.ego_description: Geralt exploring the upper terrace, walking around the circular stone platform and approaching a small ruined building

entered.detail: raised circular stone dais with concentric rings in the center of the terrace
small stone structure with arched openings and a tiled roof
dark mountain range visible on the horizon under the night sky

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the top of the stairs, Geralt enters an open stone terrace featuring a circular platform at its center. The sky is fully visible here, revealing stars and the dark silhouette of distant mountains. He walks past the platform toward a small classical building with arched openings, the stone pavement showing intricate weathered patterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside descending toward a lake

events.description: character leaves the stone terrace and descends onto grassy slope toward the lake

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking down the grassy slope away from the ruins, heading toward the lakeshore with mountains in the background

entered.detail: calm body of water reflecting the night sky at the base of the hill

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the stone terrace behind and descends a grassy hillside dotted with wildflowers. The small classical building recedes into the background as he approaches the lakeshore. The open landscape reveals a panoramic view of the lake with forested shorelines and distant mountains under the starry night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, mystical forest that gradually opens into a panoramic lakeside vista under a starry night sky. It begins by following Geralt along a narrow dirt trail beside a stream, where glowing green wisps provide illumination beneath a heavy tree canopy. As he crosses an ancient stone bridge, the enclosed forest gives way to weathered architecture, leading the camera up a wide, mossy stone staircase. The scene then expands onto an open stone terrace with a circular platform and a classical arched building, revealing the dark silhouettes of distant mountains against the stars. Finally, the camera descends a grassy hillside dotted with wildflowers, leaving the ruins behind to reveal a wide view of the lake and its forested shorelines.
